Pricing & Plans

Courses
& tuition.

Transparent fee structures. No hidden costs. Select a program built around your level, scheduling needs, and musical aspirations.

Tuition Options

Our Fee Packages

Choose a plan that suits your schedule and goals. All courses available in-person and online.

Flexible
1 Month Track

Monthly Enrolment

Flexible pay-as-you-go learning

Rs. 5,000/ total
In-Person & Online
  • 1 class per week (4 classes / month)
  • 1 hour per class at convenient timings
  • Choice of instrument or vocal stream
  • Introduction to music theory
  • Access to practice materials
  • No lock-in — renew month to month
Inquire & Enroll
Starter
3 Months Track

3 Months Course

Structured foundation program (until finish)

Rs. 25,000/ total
In-Person & Online
  • 2 classes per week (24 classes total)
  • 1 hour per class at convenient timings
  • Structured beginner syllabus
  • Choose Piano, Keyboard, Guitar, Drums, Voice or Theory
  • Regular progress assessments
  • Zahau Foundation Certificate on completion
Inquire & Enroll
Best Value
6 Months Track

6 Months Certificate

Comprehensive certificate program (until finish)

Rs. 50,000/ total
In-Person & Online
  • 2 classes per week (48 classes total)
  • 1 hour per class at convenient timings
  • Intermediate to advanced repertoire
  • Deep dive into harmony, theory & ear training
  • Personalized faculty reviews & feedback
  • Performance Grade preparation & recitals
  • Zahau Certificate on completion
Inquire & Enroll
Certificate
12 Months Track

1 Year Certificate Course

Full-year professional certification

Rs. 70,000/ total
In-Person & Online
  • 2 classes per week (96 classes total)
  • 1 hour per class at convenient timings
  • Comprehensive technique & repertoire
  • Advanced music theory & composition
  • Stage performance & recital opportunities
  • Exam board preparation (ABRSM / Trinity)
  • Zahau Annual Certificate of Achievement
Inquire & Enroll
Diploma
24 Months Track

Diploma in Music

Professional 2-year music diploma

Rs. 1,40,000/ total
In-Person & Online
  • 3 classes per week (288 classes total)
  • 1 hour per class at convenient timings
  • Full performance & composition curriculum
  • Advanced ensembles & band sessions
  • Industry mentorship & masterclasses
  • International exam board certifications
  • Zahau Diploma in Music — graduate credential
  • Career guidance & performance portfolio
Inquire & Enroll
Live Performances

Hire for Events

Bring world-class live music to your event. Our performers are available for weddings, corporate events, private parties, and more.

Solo

Single Performance

Solo artist or instrumentalist performance for your event. Ideal for private gatherings, corporate events, weddings, and special occasions.

Rs. 10,000base

⚡ Additional charge based on song selection

  • Solo performer of your choice
  • Up to 45-minute performance set
  • Standard sound setup included
  • Pre-event rehearsal & coordination
  • Additional charge for specific song requests
  • Professional stage presence & attire
Book Now
Full Band

Band Performance

Full live band experience for larger events, corporate functions, concerts, and celebrations. Guaranteed to electrify your audience.

Rs. 30,000base

⚡ Full band package

  • Full band (4–6 members)
  • Up to 90-minute live performance
  • Complete PA & sound system
  • Lighting coordination
  • Song list discussion & setlist planning
  • Professional attire & stage setup
Book Now

All event hire bookings require a non-refundable 30% advance deposit at time of booking. Final pricing confirmed after event brief discussion.

Book Free Trial class

Tuition Questions

Answers to common billing and registration questions.

Are there any hidden charges or admission fees?+

We charge a one-time registration fee of Rs. 1,000 for new students. This covers your enrollment, student dashboard access, ID card, and a starter pack containing music theory worksheets and notebook resources.

Do you offer installment options for long-term plans?+

Yes! For our 6-month, 1-year and 2-year programs, you can split the payment into convenient installments. Please contact us to discuss a schedule that works for you.

What does 'until finish' mean for the 3 and 6 month courses?+

Our 3-month and 6-month courses are structured programs with a defined syllabus. 'Until finish' means you pay once for the complete course duration — there's no recurring monthly fee during those months.

What are the additional charges for the Single Performance hire?+

The base fee of Rs. 10,000 covers a standard performance. Song-specific requests — particularly licensed compositions, complex arrangements, or custom compositions — may incur an additional fee which will be discussed and agreed upon during booking.

Are board examination fees included in the tuition?+

No. Registration fees for international exam boards (ABRSM, Trinity College London, Rockschool) are paid directly to the respective boards when applying for graded certifications.

What is your rescheduling and cancellation policy?+

We require 24 hours&apos; notice to reschedule a class. Students on regular plans are allowed up to two reschedules per term without charge, subject to faculty availability.

Stay in the loop

Subscribe to receive announcements for student recitals, faculty masterclasses, and educational resources.
